args.description: 1950s tan pickup truck seen directly from above, top-down view, nose pointing up, matching the reference truck in proportions and palette. The truck is ONE RIGID SINGLE OBJECT: cab, bed and chassis always stay one straight unbent shape in every frame
args.action: steering and drifting: the whole truck rotates together as one rigid body
frameDescriptions: truck perfectly vertical, nose straight up, wheels aligned forward
the ENTIRE truck (cab, bed, chassis and all four wheels together) rotated about 12 degrees counterclockwise as one rigid unbent vehicle, front wheels slightly steered into the turn
the ENTIRE truck rotated about 30 degrees counterclockwise as one rigid unbent vehicle, front wheels countersteered, small dust puffs at the rear wheels

args.description: 1950s blue police pickup truck, entire truck fully visible and small in the center of the frame with generous empty margin on all sides, seen from directly above in top-down view, nose pointing up toward the top of the frame, same size and framing as the reference truck sprite
frameDescriptions: single round beacon dome on the cab roof shown dark dull red, truck otherwise identical
single round beacon dome on the cab roof shown glowing bright red with a small halo, truck otherwise identical

args.description: 1950s tan pickup truck seen directly from above, top-down view, nose pointing up, one wooden cargo crate bound with rope sitting in the open truck bed, matching the reference truck exactly in proportions and palette

1950s tan pickup truck seen directly from above, top-down view, nose pointing up, three wooden cargo crates stacked and roped down filling the open truck bed, matching the reference truck exactly in proportions and palette
